title: Enter A Name In The Prompt Alert
goal: Trigger the prompt alert on the DemoQA alerts page, enter a name, and stop after the page shows the entered text.
instruction: Open the DemoQA alerts page, trigger the prompt alert, enter the provided name, and stop after the page shows the result.
review_notes: Prompt-alert task on DemoQA using dialog text input and DOM-visible result verification.

steps.explanation: I triggered the prompt alert and entered the requested name so the page can show the result.

action.summary: I entered NExUI into the prompt alert and the page now shows the entered value.
